name: cubicweb-expense

metadata.name: cubicweb-expense
metadata.summary: expense component for the CubicWeb framework

documentation:
This cube provides to implement [expense tracking application]
by modeling `Expenses`, to ask for `Refund`.

[expense tracking application]: http://www.cubicweb.org/project/cubicweb-fresh

modules.name: cubicweb_expense.sobjects
documentation:
cubicweb-expense specific hooks and notification views

:organization: Logilab
:copyright: 2008-2014 LOGILAB S.A. (Paris, FRANCE), all rights reserved.
:contact: http://www.logilab.fr/ -- mailto:contact@logilab.fr
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: cubicweb_expense.sobjects.UpdateRefundStateOperation
documentation:
adds the new expense line automatically to the corresponding
refund entity. If no refund entity is associated to the account
who paid the expense, the operation will create one.

classes.name: cubicweb_expense.sobjects.OnExpenseAcceptedHook
documentation:
* when an expense is going from "submitted" to "accepted", create
  (or update) refund entities accordingly

modules.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.utils
documentation:
Library package containing the definition of useful text formatting
functions.

functions.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.utils.format_number
documentation:
Function that formats a number to be written in the PDF document. It uses
the separating characters for numbers defined in the localized
dictionnary

number: float or int. number to be formatted.
digits: int. number of digits to be displayed ('number' is rounded if it
        has more digits).
Returns: unicode string.

modules.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.writers
documentation:
Library package containing the definition of the class that can write a PDF
file for Fresh documents (Refund or Expense). The PDF generation uses
ReportLab platypus and is based on specific flow generators and
templates.

classes.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.writers.PDFWriter

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.writers.PDFWriter.__init__
documentation:
Instanciates a PDF writer.

company_data: {'':u"", }. dictionnary containing various data about
              the company.

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.writers.PDFWriter.__init_flow_generator
documentation:
Instanciates the flow generator that will create the PDF flow content
of the document. The real class of flow generator
(ExpenseFlowGenerator or RefundFlowGenerator) depends on the class
of the entity object.

entity: Entity. Any object of class Refund or Expense.

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.writers.PDFWriter.write
documentation:
Writes a PDF document representing the entity object.

entity: Entity. Any object of class Refund or Expense.
output: string or output flow. File name or IO flow that the PDF will
        be written in.

Class writing the PDF for the Fresh documents (Refund or Expense). This
class instanciates a flow generator specific to the kind of document
(Expense or Refund) that must be written.

modules.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen
documentation:
Fresh PDF writing library package. This package is based on ReportLab PDF
library, and specifically on platypus (see ReportLab documentation for
details).

modules.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.styles
documentation:
Library package containing the styles used in the PDF generation with
ReportLab platypus.

modules.name: cubicweb_expense.site_cubicweb
documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

modules.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.templates
documentation:
Library package containing the definition of template classes (page template
and document template) used in the PDF generation with ReportLab platypus.
These classes are derived from platypus standard classes but are specific to
the Fresh application. The page template draw the static content in the
PDF documents.

classes.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.templates.FreshPageTemplate

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.templates.FreshPageTemplate.__init__
documentation:
Instanciates a FreshPageTemplate.

doc_type: string. type of the document. Can be "refund"
          (Refund) or "expense" (Expense).
company_data: {'':u"", }. dictionnary containing data about the
              company (logo filename, company address, etc.)
template_id: string. id of the page template.

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.templates.FreshPageTemplate.beforeDrawPage
documentation:
Overrides the method called before drawing on a new page of the PDF
document. This method draws various static data on the page
(logo, company address, header, page number).

canvas: Canvas. Reportlab canvas that the PDF objects are drawn in.
document: BaseDocTemplate. Reportlab document template.

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.templates.FreshPageTemplate.draw_static_content
documentation:
Draws on the PDF page the static content that is displayed on all
pages, i.e. logo, company address, header, page number.

canvas: Canvas. Reportlab canvas that the PDF objects are drawn in.
document: BaseDocTemplate. Reportlab document template.

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.templates.FreshPageTemplate.draw_string_in_width
documentation:
In a canvas, draws a string from the x,y position and within the
specified width. If the value is too large, the string
is truncated in order to keep it into the specified width. Therefore,
the string is drawned between the positions (x,y) and (x+width,y).
This method gently adds "..." at the end of the truncated string.

canvas: Canvas. Reportalb canvas that the strings are drawn in
string: unicode string. string to be drawn in the canvas
x: float. horizontal position that the string is drawn from
y: float. vertical position that the string is drawn on
width: float. maximum width of the string.

Class defining the page template used to draw the pages of the PDF documents
generated by Fresh (Expense and Refund). This page template has a main frame
that will be filled with the entities data, and draws various other elements
as the logo and the header that are displayed identically on each page
(static content).

classes.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.templates.FreshDocTemplate

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.templates.FreshDocTemplate.__init__
documentation:
Instanciates a FreshDocTemplate.
output: string or output flow. name of the PDF output file or
        writable flow where to write the PDF output

doc_type: string. type of the document that can be "refund"
          (Refund) or or "expense" (Expense).
company_data: {'':u"", }. dictionnary containing various data about
              the company.

The Fresh document template is a class explaining how to create a PDF
document for the Fresh application (Expense or Refund). It uses
the FreshPageTemplate.

documentation: use the has_reportlab selector trick to have them in the registry anyway
and avoid for instance i18n messages removing due to missing reportlab

classes.name: cubicweb_expense.views.ExpenseLineFilesComponent

modules.name: cubicweb_expense.__pkginfo__
documentation: cubicweb-expense application packaging information
pylint: disable-msg=W0622

modules.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators
documentation:
Library package containing the definition of flow generation classes used in
the PDF generation with ReportLab platypus. These classes generate the flow
content for an entity Refund or Expense in the Fresh application. This
flow content will be displayed on various pages by the FreshDocTemplate
through the platypus machinery.

classes.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.AbstractFlowGenerator

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.AbstractFlowGenerator.__init__
documentation:
Instanciates the flow generator. This constructor should never be
called directly as this class is abstract, it will be called by a
child class constructor.

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.AbstractFlowGenerator.generate_flow
documentation:
Generates the flow content (a list of Flowable) for the entity.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Refund or Expense that must
        be displayed in PDF.
Returns: [Flowable, ...]

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.AbstractFlowGenerator.get_metadata
documentation:
Gives the table that contains metadata about the entity (title,
workcase, etc.)
This abstract method will be defined in the children classes.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense or Refund.
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.AbstractFlowGenerator.get_person_name
documentation:
Gives the table that contains the name and address of the person
concerned by th document.
This abstract method will be defined in the children classes.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense or Refund.
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.AbstractFlowGenerator.get_total
documentation:
Gives the table that contains the total.
This abstract method will be defined in the children classes.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense or Refund.
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.AbstractFlowGenerator.get_total_relative_data
documentation:
Gives the table that contains useful data relative to the total
(subtotals, payment information, etc.)
This abstract method will be defined in the children classes.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense or Refund.
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.AbstractFlowGenerator.get_expenses_table
documentation:
Gives the main table of the document (that contains lines describing
the actual expenses).
This abstract method will be defined in the children classes.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense or Refund.
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

Abstract class containing the common parts for generating the PDF flow
content for the various kinds of documents generated by the Fresh
application (Refund, Expense). Specific parts are generated in the
derived classes (one for each kind of document) (cf. Template design
pattern).
For a correct behaviour, you must use a flow generator corresponding to
the kind of document you want to render in PDF.
The PDF flow content is a list of Flowable that has to be displayed on
various pages.

classes.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.ExpenseFlowGenerator

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.ExpenseFlowGenerator.__init__
documentation: Initializes the flow content generator for Expense entities.

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.ExpenseFlowGenerator.get_metadata
documentation:
Gives the table that contains metadata about the entity (title,
workcase, etc.)

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense.         .
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.ExpenseFlowGenerator.get_person_name
documentation:
Gives the table that contains the name and address of the person
concerned by th document.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense.
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.ExpenseFlowGenerator.get_total
documentation:
Gives the table that contains the total.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense.
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.ExpenseFlowGenerator.get_total_relative_data
documentation:
Gives the table that contains useful data relative to the total
(subtotals, payment information, etc.)

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense.
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.ExpenseFlowGenerator.get_expenses_table
documentation:
Gives the main table of the document (that contains lines describing
the actual expenses).

This table contains only one column. In this column, a table is
inserted for each expense line. This table also contains one column.
In this column, we insert two tables (one per line) because each line
has different column sizes. See the _build_inner_tables method for
details.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Expense.
Returns: Flowable (very likely a Table).

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.pdfgen.flowgenerators.ExpenseFlowGenerator._build_inner_tables
documentation:
Builds inner tables that will be displayed into the main table (the
one that contains ExpenseLines). Hence, an ExpenseLine cannot be
displayed on a single line, thus we build two tables of one line to
display one ExpenseLine. Each table has a different number of columns
and different sizes of columns.

line1_data: [Flowable, ...] first line
line2_data: [Flowable, ...] second line

Class building the specific contents for PDF flow content generation.
This class must be used when we want to generate the flow for an
Expense.

entity: Entity. Any entity of class Refund.

Class building the specific contents for PDF flow content generation.
This class must be used when we want to generate the flow for a

returns the list of eusers who paid something
in this container

methods.name: cubicweb_expense.entities.LineContainerMixIn.paid_by_accounts
